title: Israeli Strike Near Deir al-Balah Displacement Tents Kills One, Injures Seven
detail: An Israeli airstrike struck near tents sheltering displaced Palestinians in Deir al-Balah in central Gaza on March 26, killing at least one person and injuring seven, according to Al-Aqsa Hospital medical staff. Witnesses reported receiving advance warning calls from individuals identifying themselves as IDF personnel, instructing them to move 500 meters from the camp; however, flying debris from the explosion still struck bystanders who had gathered nearby. The strike was the latest in a pattern of attacks on displacement zones documented by OCHA during the ceasefire period. UN officials noted that as of March 2026, over 1.9 million Palestinians remained displaced across the Gaza Strip, living in makeshift shelters with deteriorating sanitary conditions.

media.caption: Israeli strike near Deir al-Balah displacement tents kills at least one person

title: Al Jazeera Reveals Full Details of Board of Peace Hamas Disarmament Plan
detail: Al Jazeera published the full details of the Mladenov disarmament plan on March 26, revealing the three core principles the Board of Peace submitted to Hamas: (1) Sequencing — heaviest weapons surrendered first, including rockets, launchers, and tunnel infrastructure maps; (2) Verification — third-party international monitoring of each disarmament milestone; (3) Reintegration — amnesty pathways and employment programs for Hamas fighters who surrender. The plan was structured across 8 months and conditioned unlocking of the $17+ billion Board of Peace reconstruction fund on demonstrated Hamas compliance. Separately, Haaretz reported that Hamas would delay its formal response to the plan due to the ongoing Iran-Israel war context, which Hamas leadership felt needed to resolve before making any major strategic commitments. Board of Peace envoy Mladenov publicly laid out the plan's principles at the UN Security Council earlier in the week.

media.caption: Al Jazeera reveals full details of Board of Peace Hamas disarmament plan for Gaza
